name: event-2026mnum-scoutgate-rolegate
description: Focused 2026mnum replay testing whether coverage-aware scout-gated features help at the event where Firebase scout coverage is densest. RoleGate adds a stricter RoleV3Gated feature family: scout defense enters role reasoning through confidence-shrunk ScoutGate values, and gated role selection requires confidence >= 0.35.

notes: A focused-event win is not enough for promotion, but it tells us whether the gate can use dense scout evidence at all.
The event-specific run is paired with full-year and bucket holdouts before any model card language changes.

RoleGate is a role-feature leakage/overfit pressure test: it should win only if confidence-shrunk scout role evidence improves held-out replay, not merely because raw scout defense sneaks through role features.
RG=C0.35 means the gated role summary records all role signals but only selects a defender when the pre-match role confidence reaches 0.35.
